{"id":"project-LICHEN-83f3","title":"EDHOC: Cast away const from nonce parameter in AEAD functions","description":"API MISUSE: aead_encrypt and aead_decrypt cast away const from nonce parameter.

Locations:
- Line 269: tc_ccm_config(&ccm, &sched, (uint8_t *)nonce, 13, 8)
- Line 303: tc_ccm_config(&ccm, &sched, (uint8_t *)nonce, 13, 8)

The nonce parameter is declared const uint8_t *, but tinycrypt's tc_ccm_config takes non-const pointer.

Issues:
1. Violates const-correctness contract with callers
2. If tinycrypt ever modified nonce, it would cause undefined behavior
3. Masks potential bugs in tinycrypt API

Fix: Either:
1. Copy nonce to local buffer before passing to tinycrypt
2. Raise issue with tinycrypt maintainers about const-correctness
3. Document the cast with a comment explaining why it's safe

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:269,303","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:07.169371Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:07.169399Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-83f3","title":"EDHOC: Cast away const from nonce parameter in AEAD functions","description":"API MISUSE: aead_encrypt and aead_decrypt cast away const from nonce parameter.

Locations:
- Line 269: tc_ccm_config(&ccm, &sched, (uint8_t *)nonce, 13, 8)
- Line 303: tc_ccm_config(&ccm, &sched, (uint8_t *)nonce, 13, 8)

The nonce parameter is declared const uint8_t *, but tinycrypt's tc_ccm_config takes non-const pointer.

Issues:
1. Violates const-correctness contract with callers
2. If tinycrypt ever modified nonce, it would cause undefined behavior
3. Masks potential bugs in tinycrypt API

Fix: Either:
1. Copy nonce to local buffer before passing to tinycrypt
2. Raise issue with tinycrypt maintainers about const-correctness
3. Document the cast with a comment explaining why it's safe
